post.summary: Register a new user
post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Rate limited to 3 attempts per hour to prevent abuse.

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limited (3 attempts per hour)

post.summary: Log in a user
post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Rate limited to 5 attempts per 15 minutes. Account will be locked for 15 minutes after too many failed attempts. Token is revoked if brute force is detected.

429.description: Too many login attempts - Rate limited (5 attempts per 15 minutes)

post.summary: Send OTP for password reset
post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Rate limited to 3 attempts per 15 minutes to prevent OTP abuse.

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limited (3 attempts per 15 minutes)

post.summary: Reset password using OTP
post.description: Public endpoint - no authentication or permission required. Requires valid OTP sent to email. Rate limited to 5 attempts per 5 minutes.

429.description: Too many requests - Rate limited (5 attempts per 5 minutes)

post.summary: Log out a single session
post.description: Requires authentication. Users can revoke their current session. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Log out all sessions for the authenticated user
post.description: Requires authentication. Users can revoke all their active sessions. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Verify a user session
post.description: Requires authentication. Verifies if the current token is valid. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Update the password of the logged-in user
post.description: Requires authentication. Users can update their own password. Uses user:self:update permission implicitly.

post.summary: Check whether the supplied password matches
post.description: Requires authentication. Verifies if the supplied password matches the user's current password. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

get.summary: Fetch a list of all permissions with pagination and search
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can view all permissions.

description.example: Allow users to read user data

post.summary: Get details of a specific permission by its ID
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can view permission details.

permissionId.description: UUID of the permission to fetch

400.description: Bad Request (Invalid ID or not found)

post.summary: Create a new permission
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can create new permissions.

description.example: Allow users to delete user accounts

patch.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can update existing permissions.

id.description: UUID of the permission to update

400.description: Bad Request (Not found or invalid input)

delete.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can delete permissions.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the permission to delete

400.description: Bad Request (Not found or invalid ID)

get.summary: Fetch a list of all roles with pagination and search
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can view all roles.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, description, or nameToShow

post.summary: Get details of a specific role by its ID
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can view role details.

roleId.description: UUID of the role to fetch

400.description: Bad Request (Invalid ID or not found)

post.summary: Create a new role
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can create new roles.

roleLevel.description: Role hierarchy level: 1 = USER, 2 = TENANT_ADMIN, 3 = SUPER_ADMIN

patch.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can update existing roles.

id.description: UUID of the role to update

400.description: Bad Request (Not found or invalid input)

delete.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can delete roles. Built-in roles cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the role to delete

400.description: Bad Request (Not found or invalid ID)

get.summary: Get all permissions assigned to a role
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can view role permissions.

put.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can assign permissions to roles.

permissionIds.description: Array of permission UUIDs to assign

delete.summary: Revoke all permissions from a role
delete.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can revoke all permissions from a role.

message.example: All permissions revoked from role successfully

get.summary: Get all users with a specific role
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Only super admin can view users by role.

post.summary: Create a new model
Get model detail by ID
Get table permissions for a model
Create or update table permissions for a model
Grant table permission to a global role
Revoke table permission from a global role
Get all granted permissions for a role
Bulk assign permissions to a role
Grant table permission to a tenant role

200.description: Permission granted to tenant role successfully

message.example: Permission granted to tenant role successfully

post.summary: Revoke table permission from a tenant role

200.description: Permission revoked from tenant role successfully

message.example: Permission revoked from tenant role successfully

post.summary: Get all granted permissions for a tenant role

patch.summary: Update ABAC rules for a tenant role permission

post.summary: Bulk assign permissions to a tenant role

200.description: Permissions assigned to tenant role successfully

message.example: Permissions assigned to tenant role successfully

post.summary: Check if user has permission for a model/action
Get allowed attributes for a user on a model

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of tenants
get.description: Requires read access to Tenant model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

parameters.name: find
parameters.description: Free-text search by name, code, or description

post.summary: Fetch details of a specific tenant by ID
post.description: Requires read access to Tenant model. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.summary: Create a new tenant
post.description: Requires create access to Tenant model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC. Supports multipart/form-data for file upload.

file.description: Optional logo file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG). Use field name "file" for the upload.

message.example: Tenant name or code already exists

patch.description: Requires update access to Tenant model. Self-check enabled. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC. Supports multipart/form-data for file upload.

file.description: Optional logo file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG). Use field name "file" for the upload.

message.example: Tenant name or code already exists

delete.description: Requires delete access to Tenant model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

message.example: Cannot delete tenant with active users

post.summary: Create a backup for a tenant
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:update permission. Creates a ZIP file containing tenant data (settings, roles, features, users, permissions).

get.summary: Get all backups for a tenant
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Returns paginated list of backups with status, size, and metadata.

get.summary: Get details of a specific backup
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Returns detailed information about a specific backup including creator, size, and metadata.

delete.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:delete permission. Deletes the backup file and record.

get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Downloads the ZIP file containing the backup data.

400.description: Backup is not ready for download

404.description: Backup not found or file missing

post.summary: Restore a backup for a tenant
post.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:update permission. Restores tenant data from a backup. Can optionally merge with existing data.

mergeData.description: Whether to merge with existing data instead of replacing

400.description: Backup is not ready for restore

get.summary: Get backup statistics for a tenant
get.description: Requires SUPER_ADMIN or TENANT_ADMIN role with tenant:read permission. Returns statistics including total backups, completed, failed, total size, and latest backup.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of users
get.description: Requires read access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Identifier of the tenant the request belongs to

post.summary: Fetch details of a specific user by ID
post.description: Requires read access to User model. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.summary: Check if a username is available
post.description: Requires authentication. No specific permission required - available to all authenticated users.

post.summary: Update a user's role
post.description: Requires update access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.summary: Create a new user
post.description: Requires create access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

password.description: Password (must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number)

patch.description: Requires update access to User model. Self-check enabled. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

delete.description: Requires delete access to User model with tenant scope. Uses dynamic RBAC/ABAC.

post.summary: Upload an avatar for a user
post.description: Requires update access to User model. Self-check enabled.

400.description: No file uploaded or invalid file type

delete.description: Requires update access to User model. Self-check enabled.

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Endpoints for managing tenants and organizations

tags.name: Tenant Backups
tags.description: Endpoints for managing tenant backups and restores

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user accounts and roles
